name: Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and core them.
2. Place the apples right side up in a medium-sized baking dish.
3. Alternately layer the sugar and Grape Nuts in the core of each apple until the core is full to slightly overflowing.
4. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons of water on each apple and a little on the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon to taste.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes, or until the apples are soft.
7. Serve warm or cold with fat-free half-and-half, if available.
